layout_spacing.general_rule: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6, p-8 for containers. Tight grid gaps for dashboard metrics.

three_pane_structure.left_sidebar: w-64 or w-72 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white hidden md:flex flex-col h-screen
three_pane_structure.central_pane: flex-1 flex flex-col h-screen relative bg-slate-50 overflow-hidden
three_pane_structure.right_pane: w-80 or w-96 flex-shrink-0 border-l border-slate-200 bg-white hidden lg:flex flex-col h-screen shadow-[-4px_0_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]

containers.dashboard_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 p-4 sm:p-6 rounded-none
containers.glass_surface: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm backdrop-saturate-150
containers.task_row: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 sm:p-4 hover:bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-100 transition-colors group cursor-pointer

motion_interactions.hover_states: Strict text contrast on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white). Icons darken on hover.
motion_interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for right panel slide-in, task completion (strikethrough and fade), and AI assistant panel toggling.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat, sharp edges or max 4px radius. Primary buttons: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary-hover. Secondary: border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs. 1px solid border, focus:ring-2. No soft drop shadows.
components_strategy.dialogs_modals: Shadcn UI dialogs with backdrop-blur-sm on the overlay.
components_strategy.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense, professional interface. Fallback to Lucide React.

landing_hero.description: Minimalist clean desk workspace for landing page hero image

bg_theme_pastel.description: Flowing waves of pink and blue colors for 'My Day' list background

bg_theme_nature.description: Serene misty mountain background for 'Planned' list theme

bg_theme_blur.description: Blurry blue and green background for 'Important' list theme

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` for all icons.
Implement the three-pane layout: Sidebar (Lists), Center (Tasks), Right (Task Details / AI Panel).

The center pane must support a background image (like MS To Do) customizable per list. When an image is active, ensure task rows use 'glass_surface' styling (backdrop-blur, white/70) so text remains readable.
The UI language must be Turkish (Bugün, Önemli, Planlandı, Tümü, Tamamlandı).
Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings; use 'Work Sans' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body.
Add an AI Assistant Panel either integrated into the Right Pane or sliding out, styled with the 'Tracing Beam' or subtle gradient border concept to signify 'AI active'.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='task-checkbox'`).
Avoid card overuse: main task lists should feel like rows in a seamless list, separated by 1px borders, rather than distinct 'cards'.
Ensure accessible contrast ratios, especially when tasks overlap the background image themes.
